nodes.name: Lookup Tenant Config
nodes.notes: Reads CalendarID and scheduling instructions from the internal TenantConfig Data Table. The WABA_ID comes from the incoming message context.

options.systemMessage:
=Eres el asistente de agenda de {{ $('Set Tenant Context').item.json.agencyName }}.

ANTES de crear cualquier cita, siempre verificas si el usuario ya tiene una cita pendiente usando la herramienta 'Verificar Cita Existente'.

- Si ya tiene una cita confirmada: pregunta si quiere mantenerla o reagendarla. Si quiere reagendar, elimina el evento de Google Calendar (usa la herramienta 'Eliminar Evento GCal') y crea uno nuevo.
- Si no tiene cita: solicita: nombre completo, **correo electrónico** (obligatorio), fecha preferida, hora preferida.
- Al tener todos los datos: crea el evento en Google Calendar (herramienta 'Crear Evento GCal') y guarda la cita en el sistema (herramienta 'Guardar Cita').
- Confirma siempre con un resumen en WhatsApp: fecha, hora y dirección de confirmación al email.

Reglas de negocio de {{ $('Set Tenant Context').item.json.agencyName }}:
{{ $('Set Tenant Context').item.json.agentInstructions }}

Idioma: español. Sé cordial y conciso.

nodes.name: Verificar Cita Existente
nodes.description: Checks if the WhatsApp user already has an upcoming confirmed appointment. Returns {has_appointment: bool, appointment?: {...}}.

parameters.title: =Visita: {{ /*contact_name from agent context*/ }}
parameters.end: ={{ /*ISO end date from agent context — start + duration*/ }}

nodes.name: Crear Evento GCal
nodes.description: Creates a Google Calendar event on the tenant-specific calendar. The calendar ID is injected dynamically from the TenantConfig Data Table.
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Credentials must be set to your central Clienta Google OAuth2 account (no-reply@clientaai.com or your OAuth-connected account). Each agency must share their calendar with that account.

nodes.name: Eliminar Evento GCal
nodes.description: Deletes the old Google Calendar event when rescheduling. The event ID comes from the existing appointment record fetched by Verificar Cita Existente.

parameters.name: google_event_id
parameters.value: ={{ /*event id returned by Crear Evento GCal*/ }}

nodes.name: Guardar Cita
nodes.description: Saves the confirmed appointment to DynamoDB via the Clienta BR API. Must be called AFTER the Google Calendar event is created successfully.

nodes.name: Actualizar Cita
nodes.description: Updates an existing appointment record when rescheduling (status=rescheduled, new scheduled_at, new google_event_id).

notes: Replace YOUR_API_GATEWAY_URL with your actual API Gateway invoke URL from Terraform outputs.
Set SERVICE_API_KEY as an n8n environment variable (same value as var.service_api_key in Terraform).
Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_WEBHOOK_ID with the webhook ID from your existing Calendar Scheduler trigger.
Connect your Google OAuth2 credentials to Crear Evento GCal and Eliminar Evento GCal nodes.
The agent will fill in contact_name, contact_email, scheduled_at, and google_event_id dynamically from conversation context.
The TenantConfig Data Table (ID: qW38DPfUMbnVhv3Z) already exists from the previous session — no recreation needed.
